meta.title: OPC UA as the Bridge to IoT
meta.description:
Randy Armstrong, of the OPC Foundation, makes a pitch that OPC UA is the best choice to connect ICS and IoT.

OPC UA has:
- Security, signed and encrypted messages (including the open source protocol stacks)
- Interoperability
- Extensible and Adaptable
- Pub/Sub to the cloud

And then Randy gets into some use cases.
